start:
Hello {name}! 👋

Send me a video link from TikTok, YouTube, or Instagram and I'll download it instantly.

💎 /pro — Subscribe to Pro
🔗 /referral — Referral link
⚙️ /settings — Your settings
limit_reached:
⛔ You've reached your daily limit ({limit} downloads).

unsupported_url:
❌ Unsupported link.
Supported: TikTok · YouTube · Instagram · Twitter

error_private: ❌ This video is private or protected.
referral_earned: 🎁 A friend joined via your link! You got {bonus} extra downloads.
pro_activated:
🎉 Pro activated for {days} days!
